column1: # Save a copy of this file
# ALL other columns: optional — leave blank to use smart defaults per type
#   name          Device label shown on schematic (required)
#   type          Device category — controls layout row + default ports (required)
#   serial        Serial number — shown as S/N: on device card
#   room          Room or zone name — used to group devices in EasySchematic
#   rack          Rack name for rack elevation  e.g. Rack A
#   rack_unit     Starting rack unit position  e.g. 3
#   rack_height_u Device height in U  e.g. 1
#   power_draw_w  Power consumption in watts  e.g. 120
#   poe           Y/N — is this device PoE powered?  e.g. Y
# PORT COUNTS — leave blank to use defaults for the device type
# (filling even one port column disables ALL defaults for that device)
#   analog_audio_in   Number of analog audio inputs (XLR)
#   analog_audio_out  Number of analog audio outputs (XLR)
#   rf_in         Number of RF antenna inputs
#   unit_cost     Unit cost in USD  e.g. 4500.00
#   venue_provided   Y/N — gear supplied by venue (excluded from pack list)
#   notes         Free-text note shown on device card
#   amplifier          Power amplifier or DSP amplifier
#   wireless-receiver  Wireless microphone receiver / base station
#   touch-panel        Touch control panel / room controller
# EXAMPLE ROWS — delete these and add your own devices below
